painPoints: Joomla CMS platform is outdated, creating a bottleneck on performance and SEO fixes
Contact page rendering bug: Austin location shows only phone number with no street address, city, state, or zip
No service-specific landing pages exist for any equipment category
No geography-specific landing pages for Houston, Austin, or named submarkets
Homepage <title> tag is the single word 'Home' with no brand, service, or city signal
Zero meta descriptions across all 10 sampled pages
Zero OpenGraph tags across all 10 sampled pages
Zero JSON-LD structured data across all 10 sampled pages
Zero Twitter cards across all 10 sampled pages
Homepage has three H1 tags instead of one
No canonical link on the homepage
robots.txt is missing — requests return an HTML error page
XML sitemap is missing — /sitemap.xml, /sitemap_index.xml, and /sitemaps.xml all return 404
Apex domain armstrongrepair.com does not resolve — only www subdomain responds
Soft-404 handling is broken — missing pages return styled HTML with HTTP 404 status
Duplicate URL pattern: /contact and /index.php/contact serve identical content site-wide
Cache headers set to no-store/no-cache/must-revalidate on every page — every request hits origin server
HSTS and security headers (CSP, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options) are all absent
Mobile TTFB is 1.40s vs 0.37s desktop — a 3.8x gap causing poor mobile ranking
17 render-blocking resources (9 CSS + 8 JS) loaded synchronously
157KB hero JPG with zero srcset attribute — full-resolution image served to mobile devices
Zero images use loading='lazy' — all below-fold images fetched before page finishes painting
Estimated mobile performance score of 32/100
Estimated desktop performance score of 58/100
Estimated 25% unique content and 50% boilerplate — far below healthy thresholds
Estimated 25% duplicate content — well above the 10% healthy threshold
/equipment-manufacturers page estimated at ~88% boilerplate
/our-team page estimated at ~72% boilerplate
/service-areas page estimated at ~68% boilerplate
/commercial-restaurant-equipment-services page estimated at ~60% boilerplate
Only 8 content URLs reachable from homepage with no service-to-service or service-to-geography cross-linking
Organic keyword footprint dropped 68% from 117 keywords in May 2024 to 37 in April 2026
Traffic dropped 32% month-over-month from March to April 2026
Approximately 76% of remaining traffic comes from a single branded search term
Armstrong ranks at position 15 for 'commercial appliance repair houston' — below the fold
Armstrong is absent from Google Map Pack for commercial kitchen repair queries in both metros
No Google Business Profile exists for the Austin location — every Austin search goes to competitors
Austin location address is missing from the /contact page on the website
Houston GBP has a 3.3-star average rating — reads as caution to multi-unit operators vetting vendors
No documented review response cadence — a negative multi-call grill repair complaint is publicly unresolved
Zero reviews on Yellow Pages Houston and Austin listings
Zero reviews on Yelp Austin listing
BBB Houston listing categorizes Armstrong under 'Auto Repairs' — wrong industry category
BBB Austin listing shows Houston phone number instead of Austin number
BBB Austin listing shows incorrect founding history ('Started 2006' vs actual 1968)
Conflicting Austin fax numbers across directories
Conflicting toll-free 800 numbers across directories
Four different contact email addresses across directories
Houston municipality listed as 'Bellaire' on BBB instead of Houston
Nine NAP inconsistencies across major directories sending conflicting signals to search engines
CFESA certification, Manitowoc STAR status, and 50+ year tenure are not surfaced with schema markup or anchor pages AI can parse
Armstrong is absent from all 10 corporate branded city page citation surfaces tested for AI platforms
Armstrong is absent from all 10 aggregator best-of list citation surfaces tested for AI platforms
Armstrong surfaces in only 3 of 10 manufacturer locator citation surfaces for AI platforms
Armstrong is not surfaced by ChatGPT or Microsoft Copilot for any tested buyer queries
Armstrong surfaces only in low-confidence categorical directory citations on Claude and Gemini
Semrush Authority Score of 8/100 with only 375 backlinks from 212 referring domains
Zero paid search spend across 24 months on Google Ads, Microsoft Ads, LinkedIn Ads, and Meta Ads
Facebook page has only 16 likes with no recent posting activity
YouTube channel has not uploaded content in approximately 7 years
LinkedIn company page has only 23 followers
Zero social media posts surfaced across all active platforms in the last 6 months
No Instagram profile detected
No YouTube channel detected
X/Twitter account is inactive
No TikTok presence
Competitors are running paid B2B social ads targeted by job title and industry while Armstrong has zero paid social spend
Competitors maintain active organic social posting cadence keeping them in the daily feed of facilities buyers while Armstrong is invisible
Armstrong is absent from AI platform responses for all Austin-metro commercial foodservice repair queries due to missing Austin GBP and zero Austin content surface
Fabrik Forms contact form has 25+ input fields including many hidden Joomla session tokens adding unnecessary DOM weight on mobile
Total site has only 8 indexable pages and approximately 1,923 total words — insufficient topical surface for AI or search engines to establish category authority
